uncertainties.note: Degraded annual Schedule B scan. 12 transaction rows on this page could not be read reliably from page/quadrant crops and are emitted as [ILLEGIBLE] placeholders to preserve row count and order.

Where row cells are null or defaulted, the Sale/Purchase/Partial Sale, date, capital-gain, and amount-column marks were not reliably legible. Amount appears predominantly in the first printed bucket $1,001-$15,000; uncertain cells should be rechecked against the source image.
